title: Youbin He
text: Remote Sensing Algorithm Engineer and prospective M.S./Ph.D. applicant in GeoAI, AI for Remote Sensing, Ecological Remote Sensing, Wildfire Risk Modeling, and Spatial Machine Learning.

title: Research & Projects
text: Overview page for Featured Research, Applied Remote Sensing Engineering, and Additional GIS & Spatial Analysis.

title: Featured Research
text: GeoAI, AI for Remote Sensing, wildfire risk modeling, wildfire disturbance and post-fire ecological dynamics in Xichang City, and attention-enhanced deep learning for remote sensing scene classification.

title: Applied Remote Sensing Engineering
text: Production-oriented remote sensing engineering, satellite data preprocessing, L1-to-L2 product generation, fire monitoring, agricultural monitoring, and crop-yield estimation.

title: Additional GIS & Spatial Analysis
text: GIScience projects covering multiscale spatial patterns of homestay development in Liangshan Prefecture and integrated assessment of urban development quality in Jinan City.

title: Publications
text: Manuscript under review and conference papers in SPIE and IEEE proceedings.

title: Selected Code & Reproducible Research
text: Python geospatial processing, remote sensing product automation, machine learning, SHAP, GeoShapley, PyTorch, and Google Earth Engine.

title: Contact
text: Email, GitHub, Google Scholar, ORCID, and LinkedIn contact links for Youbin He.
